overall.description: First-person cockpit view of a flying vehicle navigating through a cyberpunk metropolis at night. The player takes off from a neon-lit rooftop, flies over industrial outskirts with glowing red smokestacks, and lands on a traditional Japanese shrine rooftop. Game engine footage featuring dense neon signage and mixed traditional-futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit rooftop takeoff zone surrounded by cyberpunk billboards

events.description: vehicle lifts off from rooftop and begins ascending into the air
leaving dense neon district behind, approaching industrial outskirts with red glowing smokestacks

agents.ego_description: piloting a flying vehicle upward and forward away from the starting rooftop, gaining altitude over the city

entered.detail: large green neon sign with Japanese characters and 'YAKINIKU' text
tall corporate billboard with Arasaka branding visible on skyscraper
futuristic vehicle dashboard with glowing green accents and control sticks
cluster of high-rise buildings covered in colorful neon advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a rooftop surrounded by dense cyberpunk architecture and bright neon signage. The vehicle lifts off and ascends, revealing the sprawling city below. The YAKINIKU sign and Arasaka billboard dominate the left side as the vehicle gains altitude and begins moving toward the industrial outskirts.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial outskirts with distant glowing red smokestacks and highway corridors

events.description: ambient lighting shifts from vibrant neon purple to industrial red glow from distant smokestacks
vehicle banks sharply to the left to turn back toward the urban center

agents.ego_description: flying over the industrial zone at high speed, then banking left to turn back toward the neon-lit city center

entered.detail: distant industrial smokestacks emitting bright red glow against the night sky
curved lines of streetlights following the highway below
dark mountain range visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Flying over the industrial periphery of the city, the scene is dominated by distant red-glowing smokestacks and winding highways illuminated below. The vibrant neon of the downtown district fades into the background as the vehicle approaches the industrial zone, then banks left to begin the return journey.

scene_state.functional_zone: return approach to dense neon urban core with towering billboards

events.description: re-entering dense neon district with massive digital billboards and skyscrapers
beginning gradual descent toward the landing zone while reducing speed

agents.ego_description: approaching the destination while descending through the canyon of neon-lit skyscrapers

entered.detail: tall red and white communications tower with blinking lights
massive black skyscraper with Arasaka corporate logo
large vertical billboard displaying 'MOST PRECISE THERMAL IMPLANT' advertisement
traditional Japanese shrine structure with curved roof visible on approaching rooftop

segments.scene_description: The vehicle returns to the dense urban core, flying past a transmission tower and approaching the Arasaka Tower with its massive corporate branding. A traditional Japanese shrine becomes visible on a rooftop ahead as the vehicle begins its descent through the neon-lit canyon of skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: Arasaka Penthouse rooftop with traditional Japanese shrine and landing pad B2

events.description: vehicle touches down gently on the marked landing pad B2

agents.ego_description: landing the flying vehicle on the designated rooftop pad next to a traditional shrine structure

entered.detail: rooftop helipad marked with white 'B2' designation and landing lights
traditional red paper lanterns flanking the shrine entrance

segments.scene_description: The final approach brings the vehicle down toward landing pad B2 on the Arasaka Penthouse rooftop. The traditional Japanese shrine with its red torii gate and lanterns dominates the center of the frame as the vehicle descends and touches down, completing the flight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous flight from a neon-drenched urban rooftop, venturing out toward a dim industrial periphery before returning to a traditional sanctuary atop a corporate skyscraper. It begins with a vertical ascent from a rooftop surrounded by dense cyberpunk architecture, passing a prominent YAKINIKU sign and Arasaka billboard as the sprawling city opens up below. As the vehicle pushes outward, the vibrant downtown neon fades into the background, giving way to a darker industrial zone characterized by winding highways and distant, red-glowing smokestacks. The camera then banks left to return to the urban core, gliding past a transmission tower and the massive branding of Arasaka Tower before diving into a neon-lit canyon of skyscrapers. Finally, the vehicle descends toward landing pad B2, where the futuristic skyline recedes to reveal a traditional Japanese shrine with its red torii gate and lanterns as the craft touches down.
